items.title: Detained British woman describes life in Iran jail hours before being sentenced to 10 years
items.description: In a rare telephone interview from Tehran's Evin prison, Lindsay Foreman, whose husband is also held in Iran, likened their detainment to "an enduranc...

items.title: Bad Bunny to make lead acting debut in film inspired by Puerto Rican revolutionary
items.description: The singer will star opposite Edward Norton and Javier Bardem in a film titled Porto Rico.

items.title: Police statement in full after Andrew arrest
items.description: Thames Valley Police says a man is in custody and officers are searching addresses in Berkshire and Norfolk.

items.title: Starmer appoints Dame Antonia Romeo as head of UK civil service
items.description: Dame Antonia will be the first woman to hold the post and replaces Sir Chris Wormald as the UK's top civil servant.

items.title: Italy defeat puts GB's men into curling semi-finals
items.description: Team GB's men's curlers are now just two victories away from a remarkable Winter Olympic gold after sneaking into Thursday's semi-finals in Cortina.
